name: FDM sensor pod with a blocked mounting screw
intent: Represent a synthetic printed sensor pod whose only declared driver approach is obstructed by a fixed cable bridge.

parts.name: Printed sensor pod body
parts.purpose: House the sensor electronics and support the rear mounting screw

parts.name: Rear mounting screw
parts.purpose: Retain the sensor pod on its mounting plate

fastener.basis: Declared by the authored BOM for this synthetic failure fixture.

parts.name: Fixed cable bridge
parts.purpose: Route the installed harness above the mounting screw

tool_access_cones.name: Rear mounting screw vertical driver approach
tool_access_cones.rationale: The screw drive faces upward, but the installed cable bridge occupies the required approach envelope.

assumptions: This is an authored synthetic failure fixture; it does not represent downloaded or external source CAD.
The sensor pod body and cable bridge are described as FDM parts, but this fixture checks tool access only and makes no printability claim.
Every envelope is an intentionally conservative axis-aligned proxy in millimetres.
The expected obstruction is bounded evidence, not proof of exact physical interference.
